final_prompt.prompt: Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) advertising poster style, monochromatic vibrant green background (Nova Green), collage-style graphic layout with hand-drawn bold white Chinese headline '夏日出镜绿' (Summer Outfit in Green), scattered English slogans including 'COLOUR MONOGRAM', 'BRAVE!', 'PHOTOGRAPH TAKE A PHOTO', and irregular green sticker labels with white outline cutout silhouettes; central subject is a real photographed East Asian female model, medium-length straight brown hair, natural makeup, silver choker necklace, wearing black sleeveless dress with white geometric monogram pattern, bright green long gloves on both hands—right hand holding up a green Huawei nova 11 smartphone (back visible: dual-camera module and 'nova' logo), left hand on hip; studio-lit commercial fashion photography with photorealistic skin texture, direct gaze toward camera; top features Xiaohongshu red logo and '时髦好物编辑部' (Trendy Goods Editorial Dept) black-box icon; top-right has '跳过' (Skip) UI button; bottom displays interactive prompt '向上滑动 解锁时尚风向' (Swipe Up to Unlock Fashion Trends) and Xiaohongshu brand footer; vertical mobile-screen ad format with integrated UI elements.
